rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings.
Component names, ports, and connections must be sourced from the authoritative AADL model structure.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architectural integrity when inserting AGREE annexes.
Use only visible identifiers from the current AADL scope in AGREE contracts.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
Do not encode event ports as numeric or Boolean values without model-provided data.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level assignments must be placed in component implementation scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL ports or properties in AGREE contracts without ensuring their visibility and correct typing.
Do not assume that event ports are numeric or Boolean values in AGREE expressions.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
